title: Fishnet Manufacturing
description: High-performance twisting solutions for packaging yarn, strapping materials, and reinforcement threads used in modern packaging applications.

title: Agricultural Irrigation
description: Durable HDPE pipes engineered for drip and sprinkler irrigation systems delivering consistent water pressure across large fields.

title: Telecom Infrastructure
description: PLB ducts designed for optical fiber cable laying, offering low friction inner walls and high crush resistance for long-term reliability.

title: Municipal Water Supply
description: Large-diameter HDPE pipes certified for potable water distribution, resistant to scaling and corrosion over a 50+ year service life.

title: Industrial Fluid Transport
description: Chemical-resistant pipes ideal for transporting acids, alkalis, and industrial fluids in manufacturing and processing plants.
